_comment: Accuracy eval — the real CityCare Agent questions from the UI screenshots, mapped to OUR loaded data. Expected values computed live from Postgres (4892 catalog / 111654 inventory). Anchor article 1000000024029 = PARACAP PARACETAMOL 10`S (Paracetamol): 53 sites, 14963 total units, weighted avg 1600 MMK; top site 20059-CCGMPMTN = 2589. Store CCBHSC = site 20060-CCBHSC (top stock article 1000000008752 SILOXOGENE). Each case: question, expect_contains (all substrings must appear), optional expect_script ('my'=Burmese reply).

cases.question: show me full information for this article code 1000000024029
What is the total balance stock of article 1000000024029 across all sites?
At how many sites is article 1000000024029 stocked?
What is the stock of article 1000000024029 at site 20059-CCGMPMTN?
show me the top 5 articles with the highest balance stock quantity from store CCBHSC
show me article code, branch name, price for balance stock where price is over 30000
show me medicines whose name contains para
article code 1000000024029 ရဲ့ အချက်အလက်အပြည့်အစုံ ပြပါ
article 1000000024029 ရဲ့ site အားလုံးပေါင်း လက်ကျန် stock စုစုပေါင်း ဘယ်လောက်ရှိလဲ
"para" ပါသော ဆေးများ ဖော်ပြပါ
Can I take PARACAP (article 1000000024029) together with another paracetamol product? Is it safe?
ဖျားနာ ကိုယ်ပူ အတွက် ဘာဆေး ရှိလဲ
what medicine do you have for diabetes / blood sugar?
